pages.title: Phase II — Circuits & Sorcery
pages.text: $(bold)Core mods: Blood Magic, Botania, Refined Storage, Thermal, Tinkers'$(br2)The magic gate opens. Blood Magic requires your life force. Botania runs on mana. Refined Storage organizes everything.$(br2)Goal: Master all three systems, then craft the $(bold)Crimson Circuit of Passage$().

pages.title: Key Milestones
pages.text: $(bold)1.$() Blood Magic Altar — sacrifice HP for LP$(br)$(bold)2.$() Weak Blood Orb — personal LP vessel$(br)$(bold)3.$() Botania Mana Pool + Daybloom flowers$(br)$(bold)4.$() Mana Spreaders — distribute mana$(br)$(bold)5.$() Terrasteel — Phase II's endgame alloy$(br)$(bold)6.$() Refined Storage Controller + Disk Drive$(br)$(bold)7.$() Craft the Crimson Circuit of Passage

pages.title: Crimson Circuit of Passage
pages.text: Phase II seal recipe:$(br2)$(bold)Center:$() IE HV Steel Wire Coil$(br)$(bold)Top/Bottom:$() Blaze Powder$(br)$(bold)Left:$() Weak Blood Orb$(br)$(bold)Right:$() Blood Magic Blank Slate$(br2)The Weak Blood Orb requires leveling your Blood Altar to Tier 2. The Blank Slate is crafted from a smooth stone and your altar.
